text: still on for sunday call?
yep! same time as always, 5pm?
perfect, talk then 😊
Hey kiddo, just checking in on you. How's everything going?
Hi dad! Good, just been busy with work. You doing ok?
Doing alright, knee's been acting up but nothing major. Love you, call me this weekend
hey sweetie, just checking in on you 💕 how's your day going?
hii mom, good so far! just slammed w work lol. u?
same old same old, glad ur ok! call me later if u get a sec ❤️
hey hows the new job going, u surviving lol
lmaooo barely, brain is mush but its good so far
lol proud of u, we still out of oat milk btw
hey u still up? kitchen light's been on for like 3 hrs lol
omg yeah that's me being forgetful, sry! turning it off now
all good haha just checking, night!
Hey Jen! Been thinking about you lately, how's everything going?
Hi Clara! Good to hear from you, things are busy but good :) how about you?
Same old, keeping busy with grading. Let's catch up properly soon, love hearing from you.
still on for the sunday call? 4pm my time
yes! calling right at 4, put the kettle on
booked the cheap airbnb near me for your birthday weekend
can't wait, bringing the new Thread & Bone for you
how'd the open mic go, did you read the tip jar one
read it! someone cried, i'm calling it a hit
mom says come to warwick sunday if you can swing the bus
i'll try, opening shift saturday so we'll see
you signing up for a slot thursday? i'll cover the machine
yes sign me up, reading new work this time
spotify bill split — venmo or paypal this month?
paypal's fine, sending your half now
zine layout night friday at yours still on?
byo scissors, i've got the paper and the good stapler
fran posted the schedule, you're opening tue/thu/sat
saw it, off monday and friday, writing days locked in
hi sweetheart, coming down sunday? dad's grilling veggie skewers for you
i'll be there if the 2pm bus cooperates, thank you mom
don't forget your B12, you always forget when you're busy
taking it right now, promise
saw your newsletter, so proud of you honey
thank you, that means a lot coming from you
call me when you get a minute, kiddo
calling now dad, everything okay?
just wanted to hear about the reading, your mother says it went well
it did, i'll bring you a copy of the zine sunday
symposium books wants ten copies for the shelf this week
on it, i'll print the batch tonight and drop them tomorrow
release party planning — asana board updated with the tasks
saw it, i'll take the flyers and the playlist
movie night thursday after your shift? found an arthouse pick on tmdb
yes please, i'll bring the popcorn, you pick the film
kitchen's clean, left you some of the dal i made
you're a saint, thank you nia
sunday dinner in warwick, who's in?
me, taking the 2pm bus down
i'll drive mom, save us seats
veggie skewers for jen, burgers for the rest of us
bringing a mini zine for everyone, don't laugh
wouldn't dream of it, see you all sunday
